closure_text: Deviation attributed to calibration drift on gauge 51; recalibrated and verified against standard.
Containment isolated 10 affected units; supplier notified and incoming inspection tightened.
Investigation found an out-of-spec torque setting; work instruction WI-200 updated accordingly.
Deviation attributed to calibration drift on gauge 36; recalibrated and verified against standard.
Sampling error under AQL plan corrected; inspector re-qualified on the revised sampling table.
Vendor CAPA referenced; corrective action verified on subsequent lots with no recurrence noted.
Root cause traced to a mislabeled fixture on line 1; operator retrained and check sheet revised.
